engineGuide.h2: Jaguar XF Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Jaguar XF across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Jaguar's Ingenium modular diesel introduced for the X260 generation. Designed for efficiency and low emissions, but timing chain failures became the defining replacement driver.
compatibleVariants: XF 2.0D, XF 2.0D Premium Luxury, XF 2.0D Portfolio, XF 2.0D R-Sport, XF 2.0D SE, XF 2.0D S Design, XF 2.0D Sport, XF 2.0D First Edition, XF 2.0D Landmark, XF 2.0D Black Pack, XF Sportbrake 2.0D
commonFailures: Timing chain stretch and failure (commonly from 60,000-80,000 miles)
EGR cooler cracking leading to coolant loss (40,000-70,000 miles)
DPF clogging in high-mileage or short-journey cars
entries.cta: Get quotes for AJ200D Jaguar XF engine replacement

entries.title: 3.0L Diesel
entries.history: Ford-derived V6 diesel that powered the X250 XF and early X260 models. Renowned for torque delivery but plagued by bottom-end failures that often write off vehicles.
compatibleVariants: XF 3.0D, XF 3.0D Luxury, XF 3.0D Premium Luxury, XF 3.0D Portfolio, XF 3.0D S, XF 3.0D R-Sport, XF 3.0D SE, XF 3.0D S Design, XF 3.0D Sport, XF Sportbrake 3.0D
commonFailures: Crankshaft failure and bottom-end seizure (often sudden, 80,000-120,000 miles)
Injector seal leaks causing diesel smell and carbon buildup
entries.cta: Get quotes for AJD-V6 Jaguar XF engine replacement

entries.title: 2.7L Diesel
entries.history: First-generation V6 diesel fitted to the earliest X250 XF models from 2008. Ford-Lion derived unit later replaced by the 3.0L variant for additional power.
compatibleVariants: XF 2.7D, XF 2.7D Luxury, XF 2.7D Premium Luxury, XF 2.7D SE
entries.cta: Get quotes for AJD-V6 2.7 Jaguar XF engine replacement

entries.title: 2.2L Diesel
entries.history: Ford-sourced four-cylinder diesel fitted to later X250 models as an entry-level option. Known for robust bottom end but injector issues at higher mileage.
compatibleVariants: XF 2.2D, XF 2.2D Luxury, XF 2.2D Premium Luxury, XF 2.2D Portfolio, XF 2.2D SE
commonFailures: Injector seal leakage and carbon tracking
entries.cta: Get quotes for Duratorq 2.2 Jaguar XF engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: Ingenium turbocharged four-cylinder petrol introduced with the X260 generation. Replaced older Ford-derived units, offering better efficiency but introducing high-pressure fuel system failures.
compatibleVariants: XF P250, XF P300, XF 2.0 Petrol Premium Luxury, XF 2.0 Petrol Portfolio, XF 2.0 Petrol R-Sport, XF 2.0 Petrol SE, XF 2.0 Petrol S Design, XF Sportbrake 2.0 Petrol
commonFailures: VVT solenoid issues causing rough idle
Timing chain stretch on higher-mileage examples
entries.cta: Get quotes for AJ200P Jaguar XF engine replacement

entries.title: 5.0L Petrol
entries.history: Naturally aspirated 5.0-litre V8 fitted to X250 XF models before the supercharged XFR arrived. Smooth power delivery but heavy on fuel and prone to timing chain tensioner wear.
compatibleVariants: XF 5.0 V8, XF 5.0 V8 Premium Luxury, XF 5.0 V8 Portfolio, XF 5.0 V8 S
entries.cta: Get quotes for AJ-V8 5.0 Jaguar XF engine replacement

entries.title: 4.2L Petrol
entries.history: Early X250 V8 option before the 5.0-litre unit became standard. Smooth, refined, and relatively reliable compared to later supercharged variants.
compatibleVariants: XF 4.2 V8, XF 4.2 V8 Premium Luxury, XF 4.2 V8 SE
commonFailures: Valve seal deterioration on higher-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for AJ-V8 4.2 Jaguar XF engine replacement

entries.title: 3.0L Supercharged Petrol
entries.history: Supercharged V6 derived from the AJ133 V8, fitted to XF S models as a performance option below the full-fat XFR. Strong power delivery but complex.
compatibleVariants: XF S, XF 3.0 Supercharged, XF 3.0 S Portfolio, XF 3.0 S R-Sport, XF S Sportbrake
commonFailures: VVT solenoid failure causing rough running
Supercharger coupler wear (rattling noise on idle)
entries.cta: Get quotes for AJ126 Jaguar XF engine replacement

entries.title: 5.0L Supercharged Petrol
entries.history: The flagship XFR and XFR-S V8. 510-550hp of supercharged fury, but timing chain tensioners are a notorious weak point that can destroy the engine.
compatibleVariants: XFR, XFR-S, XF 5.0 Supercharged, XF 5.0 Supercharged Portfolio
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure (catastrophic engine damage, 60,000-90,000 miles)
entries.cta: Get quotes for AJ133 Jaguar XF engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Mild Hybrid Diesel
entries.history: Mild hybrid version of the Ingenium diesel with belt-integrated starter generator. Lower emissions and smoother stop-start, retaining the same timing chain concerns as the standard unit.
compatibleVariants: XF 2.0D MHEV, XF 2.0D MHEV Portfolio, XF 2.0D MHEV R-Sport, XF 2.0D MHEV SE, XF Sportbrake 2.0D MHEV
entries.cta: Get quotes for AJ200D MHEV Jaguar XF engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Jaguar XF Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense

problems.group: Jaguar XF Ingenium Timing Chain Failure
problems.h4: Jaguar XF Ingenium Timing Chain Failure - Why AJ200 Diesel Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Jaguar XF 2.0D, XF 2.0D Portfolio, XF 2.0D R-Sport, XF 2.0D SE, XF Sportbrake 2.0D (2015-2024, AJ200D / 204DTA / 204DTD)
problems.rootCause: The single-row timing chain fitted to Ingenium diesel engines stretches due to inadequate tensioner design and extended oil service intervals. Once slack develops, the chain can jump sprockets or snap, causing piston-to-valve contact and catastrophic engine failure.

repairOptions.tier: Preventative Timing Chain Replacement - Catch it before failure
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full timing chain kit (chain, tensioners, guides, sprockets), camshaft locking tools, new oil and filters
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early with rattle but no fault codes. 60k-80k mile life on replacement chain

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine - After catastrophic failure
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit of rebuilt unit with upgraded timing components, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Only option if chain has snapped or engine has jumped timing. Upgraded chain kit prevents repeat failure

problems.recommendation: If your XF diesel has a rattling timing chain on cold start but still runs smoothly, pay for a preventative chain replacement immediately - it is significantly cheaper than a full engine. If the engine has already failed, do not attempt a rebuild of your existing bottom end. The labour to strip and rebuild is comparable to fitting a professionally rebuilt unit with upgraded components, which comes with a warranty.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt AJ200D engine prices for your Jaguar XF

problems.h4: Jaguar XF AJD-V6 Crankshaft Failure - The X250 Diesel Catastrophe
problems.affectedModels: Jaguar XF 3.0D, XF 3.0D S, XF 3.0D Portfolio, XF Sportbrake 3.0D (2008-2020, AJD-V6 / 306DT)
problems.rootCause: The Ford-derived AJD-V6 suffers from oil starvation to the main bearings, particularly on higher-mileage cars where oil changes have been stretched beyond 15,000 miles. The crankshaft can snap or bearings fail completely, often at motorway speed, with no prior knocking.

repairOptions.tier: Bottom End Rebuild - Crankshaft and bearings
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove engine, regrind or replace crankshaft, new main and big-end bearings, oil pump, full gasket set
repairOptions.longevity: Feasible if failure caught early before block damage. Labour-intensive, often uneconomical

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine - After catastrophic failure
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit of fully rebuilt unit with upgraded oil pump and bearings, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most cost-effective solution on an 80k+ mile XF. Rebuilt unit addresses original oiling weakness

problems.recommendation: On an XF 3.0D worth £4,000-£7,000, a dealer bottom end rebuild is rarely economical. A specialist-fitted rebuilt engine at £3,500-£5,800 makes financial sense and buys you another 80k+ miles with upgraded components. If the crankshaft has snapped or thrown a rod, do not waste money on diagnosis - go straight to replacement.
problems.cta: Get quotes for AJD-V6 3.0D replacement for your Jaguar XF

problems.h4: Jaguar XF DPF & EGR Problems - Why Diesel XFs Clog Up
problems.rootCause: The Ingenium diesel's EGR cooler cracks internally, dumping coolant into the exhaust and blocking the DPF with soot and crystallised coolant. Short journeys prevent passive regeneration, accelerating clogging. The 2.2 Duratorq suffers similar EGR valve sticking and DPF soot loading.

repairOptions.tier: EGR Cooler Replacement - Stop the root cause
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace EGR cooler and valve, coolant flush, diagnostic reset
repairOptions.longevity: Essential first step if coolant loss detected. Prevents further DPF damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Forced static regeneration, pressure sensor check, DPF chemical clean if required
repairOptions.longevity: Works if DPF not beyond recovery. 40-60% success rate on heavily clogged units

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine - After coolant contamination
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with new EGR cooler, DPF, and upgraded components
repairOptions.longevity: Required if coolant has hydrolocked engine or DPF is beyond cleaning and back-pressure has damaged turbo

problems.recommendation: If you catch the coolant smell and EGR failure early, replace the cooler and clean the DPF - this typically costs under £1,000 at a specialist. If the engine has already run with a cracked cooler for months, the internal coolant contamination may have caused bore glazing or bearing damage. In that case, a rebuilt engine with a new cooler fitted is the cleanest long-term solution.
problems.cta: Compare XF DPF and EGR repair costs from UK specialists

problems.group: Jaguar XF AJ133 Supercharged V8 Timing Chain Failure
problems.h4: Jaguar XF AJ133 Supercharged V8 Timing Chain Failure - XFR & XFR-S Risk
problems.affectedModels: Jaguar XFR, XFR-S, XF 5.0 Supercharged (2009-2015, AJ133)
problems.rootCause: The timing chain tensioners on the 5.0 supercharged V8 lose hydraulic pressure, allowing chain slack. At its worst, the chain can snap or the guides disintegrate, sending plastic debris into the oil pickup and starving the supercharger and bottom end of oil.

repairOptions.tier: Preventative Timing Chain Replacement - Before failure
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full timing chain kit with upgraded tensioners, cam locks, new oil and filters
repairOptions.longevity: Essential preventative work on any XFR approaching 70k miles. Adds 80k+ miles

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine - After catastrophic failure
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt AJ133 with upgraded timing components, new oil pump, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Only option if chain has snapped or debris has destroyed bearings. High cost reflects specialist nature of V8 rebuilds

problems.recommendation: On an XFR worth £12,000-£20,000, preventative timing chain replacement is non-negotiable. If you hear a rattle on cold start from the front of the engine, book it into a Jaguar V8 specialist immediately. Ignoring the noise will turn a £2,000 preventative job into a £7,000+ engine replacement. We strongly recommend budgeting for this work as routine maintenance at 70,000 miles.
problems.cta: Get quotes for AJ133 XFR engine replacement from V8 specialists

problems.group: Jaguar XF Ingenium Petrol High-Pressure Fuel Pump Failure
problems.h4: Jaguar XF Ingenium Petrol High-Pressure Fuel Pump Failure - AJ200P HPFP Issues
problems.affectedModels: Jaguar XF P250, XF P300, XF 2.0 Petrol Portfolio, XF 2.0 Petrol R-Sport (2015-2024, AJ200P / PT204)
problems.rootCause: The high-pressure fuel pump on Ingenium petrol engines suffers internal wear, often accelerated by contaminated fuel or infrequent fuel filter changes. When the HPFP fails, it can send metal debris through the fuel rail and injectors, causing secondary damage.

repairOptions.tier: HPFP Replacement Only - If caught early
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace high-pressure pump, fuel filter, oil change (fuel dilution common), system purge
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if failure diagnosed immediately and injectors still functional

repairOptions.tier: HPFP + Injector Replacement - After debris contamination
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace pump, all injectors, high-pressure fuel lines, fuel rail, complete system flush
repairOptions.longevity: Required if metal debris has reached injectors. Most common scenario

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine - After internal engine damage
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with new HPFP and injectors, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Required if fuel dilution has washed cylinder bores or debris has seized camshaft actuators

problems.recommendation: On an Ingenium petrol XF, the moment you experience hesitation, misfires, or a fuel-related fault code, have the HPFP inspected immediately. Early pump replacement at £700-£1,100 at a specialist is far cheaper than the £1,300-£2,100 pump-plus-injector job. If you have already driven with the fault for weeks, prepare for the full replacement scenario.
problems.cta: Compare AJ200P petrol engine replacement prices for your XF

problems.h4: Jaguar XF EGR Cooler Cracking - Ingenium Diesel Coolant Loss
problems.rootCause: The plastic end tanks on the Ingenium EGR cooler crack from repeated thermal cycling. Coolant leaks externally (visible drips, sweet smell) and internally into the exhaust, which then blocks the DPF with crystallised coolant residue.

repairOptions.tier: EGR Cooler Replacement Only - Catch it early
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace EGR cooler, coolant flush, pressure test, diagnostic reset
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if DPF not yet clogged. Prevents further damage

repairOptions.tier: EGR Cooler + DPF Clean - After DPF damage
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace cooler, remove and professionally clean DPF, forced regeneration
repairOptions.longevity: Required if DPF back-pressure has increased but engine still runs

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine - After hydrolock or severe contamination
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with new cooler, DPF, and timing components
repairOptions.longevity: Required if coolant has hydrolocked engine or caused bore corrosion

problems.recommendation: Check your coolant level weekly on an Ingenium diesel XF. If you notice the level dropping with no visible external leak, suspect the EGR cooler immediately. At £450-£700 for specialist replacement, this is cheap insurance against a £2,800+ engine replacement. Do not keep topping up and ignoring it - the coolant is destroying your DPF and potentially your engine internals.
problems.cta: Compare XF EGR cooler replacement quotes from UK Ingenium specialists

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Jaguar XF
finalCta.paragraph: Timing chain stretch, crankshaft failure, DPF clogging, and HPFP failure are the four biggest threats to your XF's engine. The common thread across all of them is simple: early diagnosis saves thousands, while ignoring warning signs inevitably leads to a full replacement. EnginesMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Jaguar XF specialists who fit upgraded components designed to prevent repeat failure. Every rebuilt engine comes with a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, nationwide delivery available, and supply-and-fit options from our network. Compare prices today and get back on the road without paying the main dealer premium.

finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Jaguar XF and engine code. engineTypes.h2: Jaguar XF Engine Types - Options, Costs & What to Expect
engineTypes.intro: Every engine type for the Jaguar XF is available through our UK network with typical price ranges based on variant, engine code and budget.

types.title: Jaguar XF Reconditioned Engines (Recon)
types.description: Factory-spec rebuild with worn components replaced to meet original tolerances. Ideal for X250 and X260 models.
types.frontDescription: Factory-spec rebuild with worn components replaced to meet original tolerances. Ideal for X250 and X260 models.
types.frontDisclaimer: Not available for all rare codes.
types.backDescription: A reconditioned XF engine is dismantled, inspected and rebuilt to factory specifications with new gaskets, seals and bearings.
backBullets: Typically 3-5 day turnaround for AJ200D and AJD-V6 units
Includes upgraded timing components for Ingenium diesel engines
Backed by 12-24 month warranty depending on supplier
types.cta: Compare reconditioned Jaguar XF engine prices

types.title: Jaguar XF Rebuilt Engines
types.description: Stripped down to short block with new piston rings, bearings, gaskets and oil pump. Reliable mid-range option.
types.frontDescription: Stripped down to short block with new piston rings, bearings, gaskets and oil pump. Reliable mid-range option.
types.frontDisclaimer: Core charge may apply on some units.
types.backDescription: A rebuilt XF engine focuses on bottom-end restoration while reusing serviceable ancillary components to control costs.
backBullets: Balanced crankshaft and new bearings for AJD-V6 diesel reliability
New timing chain and tensioners fitted as standard on Ingenium units
Bench tested before dispatch from UK specialist workshops
types.cta: Get rebuilt Jaguar XF engine quotes

types.title: Jaguar XF Used Engines
types.description: Low-mileage salvage units tested for compression and oil pressure. Fast turnaround for urgent Sportbrake replacements.
types.frontDescription: Low-mileage salvage units tested for compression and oil pressure. Fast turnaround for urgent Sportbrake replacements.
types.frontDisclaimer: Mileage and service history vary by unit.
types.backDescription: Used XF engines are the fastest, most budget-friendly option but come with higher risk of inherited issues.
backBullets: Best suited for pre-2015 X250 models with lower replacement values
AJ200D used engines are rare due to timing chain failure prevalence
Always verify engine code matches - X250 and X260 are not interchangeable
types.cta: Check used Jaguar XF engine availability

types.title: Jaguar XF Remanufactured Engines
types.description: Industrial-grade rebuild using CNC-machined components. Every wearable part replaced including timing chains and oil pumps.
types.frontDescription: Industrial-grade rebuild using CNC-machined components. Every wearable part replaced including timing chains and oil pumps.
types.frontDisclaimer: Longer lead time for rare engine codes.
types.backDescription: Remanufacturing returns XF engines to better-than-new condition with all known factory weaknesses addressed.
backBullets: AJ133 V8 units receive upgraded timing chain tensioners as standard
Each engine hot-tested on a dyno with full report supplied
types.cta: Compare remanufactured Jaguar XF engine costs

types.title: Jaguar XF Refurbished Engines
types.description: Cosmetic and mechanical refresh including gaskets, seals and ancillaries. Entry-level option for high-mileage XFs.
types.frontDescription: Cosmetic and mechanical refresh including gaskets, seals and ancillaries. Entry-level option for high-mileage XFs.
types.frontDisclaimer: Not recommended for seized or snapped-chain engines.
types.backDescription: Refurbished XF engines are cleaned, tested and fitted with new external seals and service items without full internal strip-down.
backBullets: Suitable for XF 2.2D Duratorq engines with injector seal failure only
Not recommended for Ingenium engines with timing chain stretch
Fastest turnaround after used engines - typically 2-3 days
types.cta: View refurbished Jaguar XF engine options

types.title: Jaguar XF Supply & Fit Engines
types.description: Fully fitted service including old engine removal, new unit installation, fluids and JLR SDD/Pathfinder coding.
types.frontDescription: Fully fitted service including old engine removal, new unit installation, fluids and JLR SDD/Pathfinder coding.
types.frontDisclaimer: X260 models require specialist ECU programming.
types.backDescription: Supply and fit removes the headache of finding a separate workshop and guarantees compatibility on your XF.
backBullets: JLR SDD or Pathfinder diagnostic tool required - included in specialist fitting
X260 Ingenium petrol engines require non-negotiable ECU reprogramming
All fitted engines include new oil, filters, coolant and 12-month warranty
types.cta: Find Jaguar XF engine supply & fit deals

engineTypes.closing: All engine types include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty when sourced through EnginesMarket. Prices are typical UK market ranges based on historical quote data from our network and depend on exact engine code, variant, mileage and supplier. Use our free comparison tool above - enter your registration to get tailored quotes for your specific Jaguar XF within hours.

engineSizes.h2: Jaguar XF Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Jaguar XF across both X250 and X260 generations is listed below, with compatible engine codes, years, power outputs and common failure notes.

items.title: Jaguar XF 2.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.0-litre diesel defines the XF diesel range across both generations. First-generation X250 cars used the Ford-derived 2.2-litre unit, but from 2015 the Ingenium AJ200D family became the backbone of the X260 range, powering everything from entry-level SE to Portfolio and R-Sport trims. These engines dominate UK replacement search volume due to well-documented timing chain and DPF issues.
items.cta: Get quotes for Jaguar XF 2.0L diesel engines

items.title: Jaguar XF 2.2L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.2-litre diesel was the entry-level option for the first-generation X250 XF from 2011 until the X260 launch in 2015. Sourced from Ford's Duratorq family (also used in Transit and Mondeo), it offered respectable economy and proved more robust than the later Ingenium units - though injector seal failures are common at higher mileages.
commonFailurePoints: Injector seal leakage with carbon tracking
items.cta: Get quotes for Jaguar XF 2.2L diesel engines

items.title: Jaguar XF 2.7L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.7-litre V6 diesel was fitted to the very earliest X250 XF models from launch in 2008 until 2011, when the 3.0-litre AJD-V6 took over. A Ford-Lion derived unit shared with Land Rover, it offered smooth V6 refinement but suffers from injector seal failures and turbo actuator problems at higher mileages.
items.cta: Get quotes for Jaguar XF 2.7L diesel engines

items.title: Jaguar XF 3.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 3.0-litre V6 diesel was the performance diesel option across both X250 and early X260 generations. Ford-derived AJD-V6 units powered XF 3.0D S and Portfolio trims from 2009 to 2020, delivering strong torque but carrying a well-documented risk of sudden crankshaft failure that often writes off the engine with minimal warning.
items.cta: Get quotes for Jaguar XF 3.0L diesel engines

items.title: Jaguar XF 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.0-litre Ingenium petrol engine arrived with the X260 generation in 2015, replacing older naturally aspirated units. Badged P250 and P300 depending on tune, this turbocharged four-cylinder powers the majority of petrol XFs sold in the UK from 2015 onward. It requires non-negotiable ECU coding after any replacement.
items.cta: Compare Jaguar XF 2.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Jaguar XF 3.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 3.0-litre supercharged V6 (AJ126) was the heart of the XF S performance trim, offered from 2013 until 2020 across both X250 and X260 generations. Delivering 340-380hp, it sits between the four-cylinder Ingenium and the fire-breathing XFR V8. The supercharger coupler and VVT solenoids are known weak points.
items.cta: Compare Jaguar XF 3.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Jaguar XF 4.2L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 4.2-litre naturally aspirated V8 (AJ-V8) was fitted to early X250 XF models from 2008 until 2010, before the 5.0-litre unit took over. Producing 300hp, it offered smooth, effortless cruising but is now rare and commands specialist knowledge for replacement.
items.cta: Compare Jaguar XF 4.2L petrol engine prices

items.title: Jaguar XF 5.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 5.0-litre V8 appeared in two forms. The naturally aspirated AJ-V8 (385hp) offered refined performance from 2009 to 2015. The supercharged AJ133 (510-550hp) powered the XFR and XFR-S flagships, delivering brutal performance but carrying the infamous timing chain tensioner failure that can destroy the engine without warning.
commonFailurePoints: Timing chain tensioner failure (60k-90k miles on supercharged units)
items.cta: Compare Jaguar XF 5.0L petrol engine prices

groups.title: Jaguar XF MHEV Diesel Engine Sizes

items.title: Jaguar XF 2.0L MHEV Diesel Engines
items.description: From 2019, Jaguar introduced mild hybrid technology to the Ingenium 2.0-litre diesel. The belt-integrated starter generator (BISG) allows smoother stop-start and coasting, improving real-world economy. However, the underlying AJ200D engine retains the same timing chain stretch and EGR cooler cracking issues as the standard unit. Not sure which engine size your Jaguar XF needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. All engines supplied through EnginesMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Jaguar XF specialists.
items.cta: Enquire about Jaguar XF 2.0L MHEV diesel engine availability

fuelTypes.h2: Jaguar XF Engines by Fuel Type
fuelTypes.intro: Choose your Jaguar XF engine by fuel type to compare realistic replacement prices, known issues, and compatible UK supply options - from early X250 diesel to latest X260 MHEV.

items.title: Jaguar XF Diesel Engines
items.description: Diesel powered the vast majority of XF sales in the UK across both X250 (2008-2015) and X260 (2015-2024) generations, and dominates replacement enquiry volume.
items.descriptor: Diesel powered the vast majority of XF sales in the UK across both X250 (2008-2015) and X260 (2015-2024) generations, and dominates replacement enquiry volume.
items.familiesLabel: Common Jaguar XF Diesel Engine Families
families: AJ200D / 204DTA / 204DTD - Ingenium 2.0L four-cylinder, timing chain stretch drives replacement
AJD-V6 - Ford-derived 3.0L V6, known for sudden crankshaft failure at higher mileage
Duratorq - Ford 2.2L four-cylinder (X250 only), injector seal failures common
AJD-V6 2.7L - early X250 V6 diesel (2008-2011), turbo actuator issues
foundIn: X260 (2015-2024) - 2.0D Ingenium, 3.0D AJD-V6 (early X260), 2.0D MHEV (late X260)
knownFor: Strong motorway fuel economy (50+ mpg achievable on 2.0D)
Ingenium timing chain stretch failures between 60k-85k miles
AJD-V6 crankshaft failure - often sudden and catastrophic
DPF clogging on short-journey cars, especially pre-2019 Ingenium units
items.cta: Get quotes for Jaguar XF Diesel replacement engines

items.title: Jaguar XF Petrol Engines
items.description: Petrol XFs are less common than diesels in the UK but span naturally aspirated V8s, supercharged V6 and V8 performance flagships, plus Ingenium four-cylinders in later X260 models.
items.descriptor: Petrol XFs are less common than diesels in the UK but span naturally aspirated V8s, supercharged V6 and V8 performance flagships, plus Ingenium four-cylinders in later X260 models.
items.familiesLabel: Common Jaguar XF Petrol Engine Families
families: AJ200P / PT204 - Ingenium 2.0L turbo four-cylinder (X260), HPFP failures common
AJ126 - 3.0L supercharged V6 (XF S), VVT solenoid and supercharger coupler wear
AJ133 - 5.0L supercharged V8 (XFR / XFR-S), timing chain tensioner failure at 60k-90k miles
AJ-V8 5.0 - naturally aspirated 5.0L V8 (X250), water pump and thermostat issues
AJ-V8 4.2 - early X250 4.2L V8 (2008-2010), timing chain tensioner wear
foundIn: X250 (2008-2015) - 4.2 V8, 5.0 V8, 5.0 Supercharged (XFR), 3.0 Supercharged (XF S from 2013)
knownFor: Supercharged V8 performance (510-550hp in XFR/XFR-S)
AJ133 timing chain tensioner failure - catastrophic if ignored
AJ200P high-pressure fuel pump failure (50k-80k miles)
Specialist ECU coding required for all Ingenium petrol replacements
Lower replacement volume than diesel, but higher transaction values
items.cta: Compare Jaguar XF Petrol engine prices

items.title: Jaguar XF Mild Hybrid (MHEV) Engines
items.description: From 2019, Jaguar introduced 48-volt mild hybrid technology to the Ingenium 2.0-litre diesel, improving stop-start refinement and reducing emissions.
items.descriptor: From 2019, Jaguar introduced 48-volt mild hybrid technology to the Ingenium 2.0-litre diesel, improving stop-start refinement and reducing emissions.
families: AJ200D MHEV - 2.0L four-cylinder diesel with belt-integrated starter generator (BISG)
48-volt BISG replaces the standard alternator, recovering energy during braking
Electric torque assistance during acceleration reduces diesel load
Allows coasting with engine off at motorway speeds for fuel savings
importantNotes: Underlying engine is still the AJ200D - timing chain and EGR cooler failures remain risks
MHEV components (BISG, 48V battery) should be inspected during engine replacement
No plug-in hybrid or full electric XF exists - MHEV is the only electrified option
Availability is more limited than standard diesel; specialist suppliers only
items.cta: Enquire about Jaguar XF MHEV diesel engine availability

fuelTypes.closing: Not sure which fuel type your Jaguar XF has? Enter your registration number above to instantly identify your engine code, fuel system and compatible replacement options - all backed by a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Jaguar XF specialists.

engineYears.h2: Jaguar XF Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers every major engine change across the Jaguar XF production timeline from 2008 to 2024, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine by year and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The first-generation X250 XF launched with Ford-derived V6 diesels and naturally aspirated V8 petrols, setting the template for Jaguar's executive saloon.
keyChanges: X250 generation launched (2008) - Jaguar's first diesel saloon
2.7L AJD-V6 diesel and 4.2L AJ-V8 petrol at launch
5.0L AJ-V8 naturally aspirated petrol replaced 4.2L in 2009
knownFor: First diesel Jaguar - strong motorway cruiser with 40+ mpg
AJD-V6 injector seal failures cause diesel smell and carbon build-up
2.7L turbo actuator problems common at higher mileage
XFR timing chain tensioner failure risk from 60k miles
years.cta: Get quotes for 2008-2011 Jaguar XF replacement engines
years.ticker: Jaguar XF 2.7D injector seal failure • Jaguar XFR timing chain tensioner replacement • AJD-V6 3.0D turbo failure
enquiries: Jaguar XFR timing chain tensioner replacement

years.description: The X250 received a facelift in 2011, and the Ford-sourced 2.2L Duratorq diesel arrived as a more economical entry-level option.
keyChanges: X250 facelift with revised front and rear styling
knownFor: 2.2D offered genuine 50+ mpg economy
Duratorq engine is robust but suffers injector seal leaks
Lower replacement volume than later Ingenium diesels
Still uses Ford-derived engine architecture, not yet Ingenium

years.preview: X250 Final Years & XF S Arrives
years.description: The X250's final years saw the arrival of the supercharged AJ126 V6 in the XF S, plus continued production of the 2.2D and 3.0D diesel workhorses.
keyChanges: XF S launched with 3.0 supercharged V6 (AJ126)
3.0D AJD-V6 remains the diesel performance option
knownFor: XF S offered 380hp supercharged V6 - popular performance compromise
XFR-S rare with only 550hp - high-value replacement market
AJD-V6 crankshaft failure risk remains (80k-120k miles)
Duratorq injector seals still the main diesel failure
years.cta: Get quotes for 2013-2015 Jaguar XF replacement engines
years.ticker: Jaguar XF S AJ126 supercharger coupler wear • XFR timing chain tensioner failure • XF 3.0D crankshaft seizure
enquiries: Jaguar XF S AJ126 supercharger coupler wear

years.description: The second-generation X260 launched in 2015 with Jaguar's all-new Ingenium AJ200 four-cylinder diesel - and immediately introduced the timing chain stretch problems that now dominate replacement searches.
keyChanges: X260 generation launched on new lightweight aluminium architecture
No V8 petrol in X260 - XF S gets AJ126 3.0 supercharged
knownFor: Ingenium timing chain stretch from 60k miles - biggest single replacement driver
EGR cooler cracking leads to coolant loss and DPF damage
Lightweight aluminium body improves fuel economy
DPF clogging common on short-journey 2.0D cars
years.cta: Compare 2015-2018 Jaguar XF replacement engine quotes
years.ticker: Jaguar XF 2.0D timing chain stretch • Ingenium EGR cooler replacement • XF P250 HPFP failure • XF diesel DPF clogging

years.description: The X260 facelift brought mild hybrid technology to the 2.0 diesel, while post-2019 Ingenium engines received upgraded timing components to address the notorious chain stretch failures.
keyChanges: X260 facelift with new bumpers, lights and grille
MHEV 48V system introduced on 2.0 diesel (AJ200D MHEV)
Timing chain components upgraded on post-2019 Ingenium units
mainEngines: AJ200D MHEV - 2.0 mild hybrid diesel (2.0D MHEV)
AJ200D - 2.0 diesel (2.0D - non-MHEV continues in some trims)
knownFor: Post-2019 timing chains more durable - fewer catastrophic failures
MHEV improves stop-start refinement and real-world economy
Petrol HPFP failures remain common on AJ200P
Last years of internal combustion XF before electrification shift
years.cta: Get quotes for 2019-2020 Jaguar XF replacement engines
years.ticker: Jaguar XF 2.0D MHEV engine availability • XF P250 HPFP replacement • post-2019 timing chain reliability

years.description: The final years of X260 production saw reduced engine options as Jaguar prepared for its all-electric future, with only 2.0 diesel MHEV and 2.0 petrol remaining.
keyChanges: Production ceased 2024 with no direct successor
mainEngines: AJ200D MHEV - 2.0 mild hybrid diesel (2.0D MHEV)
knownFor: Reduced engine range - diesel still dominates UK sales
MHEV system now standard on all diesels
Lower replacement volume than earlier years
Parts availability for late X260 remains good from specialists
years.cta: Compare 2021-2024 Jaguar XF replacement engine prices

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Jaguar XF was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a minimum 12-month warranty from UK Jaguar XF specialists.

faq.h2: Jaguar XF Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much should a Jaguar XF engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: A Jaguar XF engine replacement typically costs £1,600-£4,500 for a 2.0 Ingenium diesel, £1,800-£4,800 for a 3.0 V6 diesel, and £2,800-£7,500 for a supercharged V6 petrol. Supply-only prices exclude fitting.
keyPoints: 2.0 Ingenium diesel (AJ200D): £1,600-£4,500 for rebuilt unit
3.0 V6 diesel (AJD-V6): £1,800-£4,800 depending on condition
2.0 Ingenium petrol (AJ200P): £1,800-£4,200 supply only
Labour adds £400-£800 including JLR SDD coding
XFR 5.0 supercharged V8: £3,500-£9,500 specialist supply
items.cta: Compare Jaguar XF engine replacement prices from UK specialists

items.question: Is the Jaguar XF 2.0 Ingenium diesel engine reliable?
items.answer: The Ingenium 2.0 diesel has well-documented timing chain stretch issues between 60,000-85,000 miles. Post-2019 models received upgraded timing components that improved reliability significantly.
keyPoints: Timing chain stretch is the most common failure (60k-85k miles)
EGR cooler cracking causes coolant loss and DPF damage
DPF clogging common on short-journey cars
Post-2019 engines have upgraded timing chains - much improved
Regular oil changes (every 8k-10k miles) reduce risk
items.cta: Get quotes for Jaguar XF 2.0 Ingenium diesel replacement engines

items.question: What causes the Jaguar XF 3.0 V6 diesel crankshaft failure?
items.answer: The AJD-V6 3.0 diesel suffers from oil starvation to main bearings, causing sudden crankshaft failure without warning. This typically occurs between 80,000-120,000 miles and often writes off the engine.
keyPoints: Extended oil changes (over 15k miles) accelerate bearing wear
Failure is often sudden - no knocking beforehand
Complete bottom-end seizure requires full engine replacement
Rebuilt units with upgraded oil pumps are the best solution
Regular 8k-10k oil changes using correct spec oil reduces risk
items.cta: Compare Jaguar XF 3.0 V6 diesel replacement engine prices

items.question: How long does a Jaguar XF 2.0 petrol engine replacement take?
items.answer: A Jaguar XF 2.0 Ingenium petrol (P250/P300) replacement takes 14-18 hours labour due to tight engine bay packaging and integrated electronics. UK specialists typically quote £1,200-£1,800 for labour alone.
keyPoints: Engine removal requires lifting front subframe or detaching suspension arms
ECU reprogramming using JLR SDD/Pathfinder is legally required
Non-negotiable coding adds time and specialist expertise needed
Labour only: £1,200-£1,800 plus cost of rebuilt engine
DIY not recommended without professional-grade tools and OEM diagnostics
items.cta: Find Jaguar XF 2.0 petrol supply & fit deals near you

items.question: Should I rebuild or replace my Jaguar XF engine?
items.answer: Replace rather than rebuild if your AJD-V6 diesel has suffered crankshaft failure or your Ingenium timing chain has snapped. Rebuilds are only cost-effective for minor failures like injector seals or EGR coolers.
keyPoints: Rebuild viable for: injector seals, EGR cooler, turbo actuator, DPF clean
Replacement necessary for: snapped timing chain, crankshaft failure, seized bottom end
Labour to strip and rebuild often exceeds cost of a warranted rebuilt unit
Rebuilt engines include upgraded components addressing original failure points
All units through EnginesMarket carry 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Get expert advice on Jaguar XF rebuild vs replacement - compare quotes now

items.question: What are the symptoms of a failing timing chain on a Jaguar XF diesel?
items.answer: Rattling noise on cold start for 1-2 seconds is the earliest warning. Other signs include loss of power, engine management light, poor fuel economy, and extended cranking before starting.
keyPoints: Cold start rattle (1-3 seconds) - most common early symptom
Check engine light with cam/crank correlation fault codes
Metal debris in oil during service
Engine running rough or misfiring
Complete failure causes engine to crank but not start - or catastrophic damage
items.cta: Compare Jaguar XF timing chain replacement quotes

items.question: Is the Jaguar XF 2.2 diesel reliable and should I buy one used?
items.answer: Yes, the Ford Duratorq 2.2 diesel is one of the more reliable XF engines. It avoids the Ingenium timing chain issues but suffers injector seal failures around 80k-120k miles. It's a solid used buy if serviced properly.
keyPoints: No timing chain stretch issues - Ford unit is robust
Injector seal leakage is the main failure point (carbon tracking)
DPF clogging possible on short journeys - needs regular motorway runs
Pre-2015 X250 models only - discontinued when X260 arrived
Excellent fuel economy (50+ mpg) and lower replacement cost than Ingenium
items.cta: Get quotes for Jaguar XF 2.2 Duratorq replacement engines

items.question: Does a replacement Jaguar XF engine need ECU coding?
items.answer: Yes - non-negotiable. Any Jaguar XF engine replacement requires JLR SDD or Pathfinder diagnostic tool programming. Ingenium petrol engines are especially complex and cannot be fitted without proper coding.
keyPoints: ECU must be reprogrammed to recognise new engine's parameters
X260 models require specialist coding - DIY impossible
Immobiliser and security systems need synchronisation
Only JLR-certified diagnostic tools can perform the coding
Supply & fit services always include full coding as standard
items.cta: Find Jaguar XF engine specialists with full coding capability

items.question: What is the most common engine failure on the Jaguar XF?
items.answer: Timing chain stretch on the 2.0 Ingenium diesel is the single most common failure, driving the majority of UK replacement enquiries. Second is AJD-V6 3.0 diesel crankshaft failure, followed by HPFP failure on 2.0 petrols.
keyPoints: Ingenium 2.0D timing chain stretch (60k-85k miles) - most frequent
AJD-V6 3.0D crankshaft seizure (80k-120k miles) - most catastrophic
AJ200P petrol HPFP failure (50k-80k miles) - growing rapidly
EGR cooler cracking on 2.0D - leads to DPF damage
Post-2019 models have upgraded timing chains - much lower failure rate
items.cta: Compare prices for all Jaguar XF engine types - diesel, petrol, rebuilt

items.question: Is the Jaguar XF expensive to maintain and repair?
items.answer: The XF is moderately expensive - more than a Mondeo but less than a BMW 5 Series. A rebuilt engine costs £1,600-£4,500 plus £400-£800 fitting. Specialist labour rates (£80-£120/hour) are lower than main dealers (£180-£250/hour).
keyPoints: Specialist labour: £80-£120/hour vs dealer £180-£250/hour
Rebuilt 2.0 diesel engine: £1,600-£4,500 supply only
Dealer timing chain replacement: £1,800-£2,500 vs specialist £1,100-£1,600
Regular maintenance (oil changes every 8k miles) critical for longevity
A well-maintained XF costs roughly average for the executive class
items.cta: Compare Jaguar XF engine replacement costs - get free quotes today
